summary.headline: THRESHOLD / EXTREME
summary.description: Five vectors converging simultaneously: military multi-front expansion, financial warfare declaration, geopolitical credibility collapse, Third Temple acceleration, and theological convergence across all four traditions. New vector added: Information Warfare. Ramadan 1447 overlay active — Laylatul Qadr imminent. Watching for 90. Automated test refresh executed from cron to verify the live publish pipeline. Evening RSS cycle confirms multi-front escalation: US Embassy Baghdad hit twice, Americans ordered to evacuate Iraq. Israel running dangerously low on missile interceptors after sustained Iranian barrages. Iran issues evacuation warnings for UAE ports, threatens to expand targeting. Trump rejects all diplomatic overtures, calls for allied naval coalition at Hormuz. Information warfare intensifies — FCC threatens broadcaster licenses over war coverage. 5,000 additional US Marines dispatched to region. Both sides signaling extended conflict with no negotiation window.

vectors.note: All four traditions — Evangelical Christian, Messianic Jewish, Islamic, Orthodox Christian — pointing at the same geography with the same intensity simultaneously. No historical precedent for this convergence.

intel_cards.title: US Embassy Baghdad hit twice — Americans ordered to evacuate Iraq
intel_cards.summary: US Embassy in Baghdad struck by missiles twice in 24 hours. Iran-backed militia claimed responsibility. Embassy issued immediate evacuation order for all American citizens in Iraq. Second direct attack on US diplomatic facility.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Direct attacks on US diplomatic facilities cross traditional escalation thresholds. Embassy evacuations signal loss of territorial security control in allied nations.

intel_cards.title: Israel warns US of critical missile interceptor shortage
intel_cards.summary: Israel warned US it is running dangerously low on ballistic missile interceptors after sustained Iranian attacks. Stockpile under heavy strain. Washington has known for months this was a critical vulnerability.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Interceptor depletion creates exponential vulnerability. Iran's sustained barrage strategy designed to exhaust defensive systems before major strike packages.

intel_cards.title: Iran issues evacuation warnings for UAE ports — targeting expansion
intel_cards.summary: Iran issued evacuation warnings for major UAE ports including Jebel Ali (region's largest container hub), Khalifa Port Abu Dhabi. Claims US forces used facilities to launch strikes on Iranian oil infrastructure.
intel_cards.source_label: Associated Press via Middle East Eye
intel_cards.analyst_note: Geographic expansion beyond Israel-Iran bilateral. UAE infrastructure targeting threatens Gulf economic stability and global shipping lanes.

intel_cards.title: FCC threatens broadcaster licenses over Iran war coverage
intel_cards.summary: FCC Chair Brendan Carr threatened US news broadcasters could lose licenses over Iran war coverage. Accused outlets of spreading misinformation after Trump criticized reports of Iranian strikes damaging US aircraft in Saudi Arabia.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Information warfare escalating to regulatory threats against traditional media. Broadcast licensing as weapon indicates narrative control priority during wartime.

intel_cards.title: 5,000 additional US Marines dispatched to Middle East
intel_cards.summary: SecDef Hegseth approved CENTCOM request for amphibious ready group and Marine expeditionary unit — up to 5,000 additional Marines and sailors heading to Middle East theater.
intel_cards.source_label: Wall Street Journal via Middle East Eye
intel_cards.analyst_note: Significant force escalation indicates preparation for extended ground operations or major amphibious capability. Marines signal potential for broader regional intervention.

intel_cards.title: Trump rejects all diplomatic mediation — extended conflict confirmed
intel_cards.summary: Trump rejected Middle East efforts to broker Iran war talks. Both US and Iran showing no interest in negotiation. Jerusalem Post: 'Both sides are in for an extended conflict' as operations Epic Fury and Roaring Lion continue.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Explicit rejection of diplomatic off-ramps removes de-escalation mechanisms. Both sides signaling commitment to military resolution rather than negotiated settlement.

intel_cards.title: Israel kills Iranian intelligence chiefs in Tehran strike
intel_cards.summary: IDF confirmed killing acting chiefs of Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya intelligence in Tehran strike. Officials identified as Abdallah Jalali-Nasab and Amir Shariat. Operation carried out with Israeli Military Intelligence guidance.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Decapitation strikes on intelligence leadership in Iranian capital demonstrate deep penetration capability. Targeting command structure rather than just infrastructure.

intel_cards.title: Gulf states arresting citizens for posting strike footage
intel_cards.summary: Bahrain arrested six for posting videos about Iranian attacks. Kuwait arrested three for filming strikes with drones. Gulf states implementing broad information control measures during conflict.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Information warfare extending to civilian populations. Gulf allies implementing wartime censorship protocols to control narrative and prevent panic.

intel_cards.title: Cron test refresh executed
intel_cards.summary: A synthetic cron-generated packet was published to verify that the live dashboard can update on schedule.
intel_cards.analyst_note: This card is intentionally synthetic and should be replaced once live source ingestion is wired.

intel_cards.title: Iran declares banks and financial institutions legitimate targets across Middle East
intel_cards.summary: Iran's joint military command officially declared banks and financial institutions legitimate targets across the Middle East. Abraham Accords financial infrastructure now explicitly in the crosshairs. Markets have not fully priced this.
intel_cards.analyst_note: This is a direct targeting declaration, not rhetoric. Markets lag language shifts when energy and financial-system threats converge.

intel_cards.title: Strait of Hormuz effectively closed for 10 days, now being mined
intel_cards.summary: Sen. Murphy confirmed: "The strait has effectively been closed for 10 days. Iran is now mining the strait. This war is costing at least $2B/day." No plan to reopen. 20M barrels/day offline.
intel_cards.analyst_note: This is the single cleanest trigger for a fast score jump toward 90. Hormuz closure couples military, economic, and energy stress into one lane.

intel_cards.title: February CPI prints in line — pre-war data, real shock hits April
intel_cards.summary: February CPI: +0.3% MoM / +2.4% YoY. Core: +0.2% MoM / +2.5% YoY — slight dovish surprise on core. This is pre-war data. The real oil shock from $119 crude and Hormuz closure does not appear until the April print.
intel_cards.analyst_note: Dovish core buys the bulls 30-60 minutes. War headlines cap any real rally. The muted print does not cancel energy shock risk — it just hasn't shown up in the data yet.

intel_cards.title: Hezbollah opens second front — IDF expanding Lebanon operations
intel_cards.summary: Hezbollah opening second front from Lebanon. IDF expanding south Lebanon evacuation orders to 50+ villages. Five Iranian missile barrages at Israel today alone. Iran simultaneously targeting Gulf states. West Bank under full lockdown. This is not a single-front event anymore.
intel_cards.analyst_note: The significance is convergence — multiple fronts reinforcing each other simultaneously. Each front individually is manageable. Together they compound.

doctrine.title: Netanyahu Messiah Doctrine — Fully Documented
doctrine.quote: "We will make it to the return of the Messiah, but this will not happen next Thursday."
doctrine.quote_source: — PRIME MINISTER BENJAMIN NETANYAHU // MARCH 12, 2026 // ACTIVE WARTIME STATEMENT

cards.text: The late Rebbe Schneerson told a young Netanyahu 30 years ago: "You will be the prime minister who passes the scepter to the Messiah." That prophecy is now circulating openly in Israeli media during active war.

Netanyahu framed explicitly as an accelerationist — someone who could precipitate or force God's intervention in history. Kohanim (Temple priests) being actively recruited by his government for Temple service.
Netanyahu on record to i24: "If you're asking if I have a sense of mission, historically and spiritually, the answer is yes." Accepted amulet of Greater Israel map saying "This is my vision."

cards.text: ADL published comprehensive bias report March 2025 explicitly lobbying to reshape AI responses on Israel. Claude, GPT, Gemini, Llama all targeted. 34,400 queries submitted. Calling on AI companies to change training data.

ADL CEO Greenblatt testified before Israeli Knesset January 7, 2025 — American organization reporting to foreign parliament. Invoked Mossad pager operation as the model for information warfare strategy.
ADL education programs documented across K-12 curriculum. Wikipedia editors banned after ADL pressure. Social media declared 8th front of organized information campaign. All operating simultaneously.
